item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 11min If someone in your life shares this opinion, please let them know that *eve
item.description:
Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 11min If someone in your life shares this opinion, please let them know that *every golfer* (not just former Masters winners) has unlimited access to the course in the lead up to the tournament. This is not a thing. Cita First Take @FirstTake · 2h Did Rory McIlroy have an "unfair advantage" in the Masters Tournament?
@stephenasmith and @WindhorstESPN weigh in on McIlroy's back-to-back wins 7 8 85 5 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min En respuesta a @KVanValkenburg (Unlimited meaning as long as a member will
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 9min En respuesta a @KVanValkenburg (Unlimited meaning as long as a member will take them out. No one goes out unaccompanied for a quick 18.) 1 16 1 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 18min Genuinely think if this goes in, he is gonna win in a playoff, which is why
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 18min Genuinely think if this goes in, he is gonna win in a playoff, which is why those Rory birds on 12-13 felt so huge. Scottie had to get one of the hard holes coming in. Cita Woody @woodyVSworld · 19h If this dropped things could’ve gotten weird 6 2 40 7 mil

item.title: slicedpod: Ben Coley reposteó Sliced Podcast @slicedpod · 1h Another Masters for McIlroy Another near-miss for Rose Scheffler ba
item.description:
Ben Coley reposteó Sliced Podcast @slicedpod · 1h Another Masters for McIlroy Another near-miss for Rose Scheffler back to his best Young likely contend again Personal best for Hatton Social media slip from Bob Head-loss from Sergio
And everything else we could cover in under 1hr De linktr.ee 2 5 6 2 mil
